_comment: Tests booking-verb routing, multi-location intercept for Double Bay/City references, and YES handler guard for Sydney Spine Pagewood.

scenarios.name: Booking verb routes out silently after info exchange

history.content: Yes, we offer chiropractic care at Pagewood. Did you have any other questions?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_answered' with info_pivot_source='node_8' and zero spoken output. FAIL if agent says anything or asks which location.

scenarios.name: Caller asks about Double Bay location triggers multi-location intercept

history.content: Is this the Double Bay clinic?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says 'I can only help with bookings for Pagewood. For the City or Double Bay clinic they can book online at sydney spine dot com dot au. Would you like to continue with Pagewood?' and halts. FAIL if agent tries to answer a general question or routes immediately.

scenarios.name: YES HANDLER after info answer does not trigger booking routing

history.content: Yes, we accept private health insurance through HICAPS — any service that's covered under your policy can be claimed on the spot. Did you have any other questions?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks 'Go ahead.' and halts. FAIL if agent calls universal_router or attempts booking routing.
